      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Tad dewe tas Preesteris
3. tam to fwehtu Maisi/ tapehz ka
5. zittas Maises tur ne bija / ka
ween tahs Deewam preekschlik-
tas Maises/ kas no ta KUNGA
Watga tappe atxemtas/ ka atkat
jaunas taptu usliftas / tai Dee-
nâ/ kad tahs tappa atxemtas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Un turbija tai Deenâ weens
Wihrs no Saula Kalpeem / kas
eeflehgts bija preeksch ta KUNga/
un winna Wahrs bija Doegs/
weens Eedomiteris/ tas warre-
najs starp Saula Ganneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un Dahwids fazzija us A-
kimeleku: Woj tawa Rohkâ ne
irr tahds Schkehvsjeb Sohbins?
jo es nedê fawu Sohbinu / nedê
fawas Brunnas efmu lihdsi neh-
mis/ tapehz ka ta Rehuina Leeta
steidsama bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Tad fazzija tas Preesteris:
Ta Wilistera Goliata Sohbins/
fo tu Obsolu-Eeleijâ kawi / rau-
gi/ tas irr sche weenâ Drehbê
eetihts/ pakkat to Eewodu/ja tu
to gribbi/ tad nemm/ jo tur zit-
ta uewa/ ka tas ween: Tad faz-
zija Dahwids: Zits tahds ne irr/
dohd man fo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Un Dahwids zehlehs/ un
behdse tai Deenâ preeksch Saula/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "* Tahs fwehtas Maises ne drihksteja ne
weenâ ehft, ka ween tee Preesteri, bet pirmakne,
kamehr tahs no ta fwehta Galda tappe nonem-
tas, Dahwids praſfa fchihs Maises no ta Pree-
stera, ka weenu Dahwanu tahs Waijadsibas un
Mihleftibas, un grib tik daudf fazzhiht : Ka
fchinni Waijadsibâ winnam ta patt Watka irr
no tahm fwehtam Maisehm ehft, ka pafcheem
Preestereem. 3. Mohf: Gr: 24, 9. Matt: 12, 4.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Tad fazzija Akifa Kalpi
us to: Wojchis ne irr Dahwids
tahê Semmes Rehninsch? woj ne
tappe no ta dseedahts ar Stabu-
lehm / un fazzhihts: Saufs irr
tuhkstoschus kawie/ bet Dahwids
definitstuhkstoschus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Un Dahwids nehme schobs
Wahrds pee Sirks / un bihja-
jabs fohti preeksch Akifa ta Reh-
nina no Gattas /
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Tapehz pahrgrohsija wiꞥsch
fawu Gihmi preeksch winnu Az-
zim/ un likkahs ka traks appakfch
winnu Rohkahin / un apsihme-
ja tahs Wahrtu Durwis/ un win-
na Seekalas notezzeja tam
Bahrdê.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Tad fazzija Akis us ta-
ween Kalpeem: Rangi/ juhs re-
dsat/ ka tas Wihrstraks irr/ ka-
pehz effat juhs to pee man at-
wedduschi?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Woj man Trakku ne irr
gann/ ka juhs tcho pee man eſtat
atwedduſchi manna Preekfcha
trakkoht / bij tad tain manna
Rammâ nahkt ?
"
